parameters.content:
## in bash
curl -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook-test/incident -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"service\":\"checkout-api\",\"level\":\"error\",\"message\":\"PaymentGateway timeout after 30000ms\"}"
##out put should be like:
#
{
  "service": "checkout-api",
  "level": "ERROR",
  "message": "PaymentGateway timeout after 30000ms",
  "signature": "PaymentGateway timeout after Nms",
  "fingerprint": "checkout-api:PaymentGateway timeout after Nms",
  "received_at": "2026-05-22T..."
}
